import string
import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errors: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = append_str(errors, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errors = append_str(errors, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errors = append_str(errors, "too-old")
  end
  errors
end

fn append_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = push_str(result, v)
    when None
      result = result
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result = push_str(result, s)
  result
end

fn push_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut out: List<String> = [s]
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      out = prepend_into(out, v, i)
    when None
      out = out
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  rebuild(xs, s)
end

fn rebuild(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut tmp: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      tmp = cons_at_end(tmp, v)
    when None
      tmp = tmp
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  cons_at_end(tmp, s)
end

fn cons_at_end(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut n = xs.len()
  mut acc: List<String> = [s]
  while n > 0
    n = n - 1
    match xs.get(n)
    when Some(v)
      acc = [v] ++ acc
    when None
      acc = acc
    end
  end
  acc
end

fn prepend_into(_ xs: List<String>, _ v: String, _ idx: Int) -> List<String>
  xs
end

fn main() -> Unit
  run_case("", -5)
  run_case("Alice", 30)
  run_case("Bob", 200)
end

fn run_case(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> Unit
  let errs = validate(name, age)
  if errs.len() == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    mut msg = "errors="
    mut i = 0
    while i < errs.len()
      match errs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0
          msg = "#{msg}#{v}"
        else
          msg = "#{msg},#{v}"
        end
      when None
        msg = msg
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print(msg)
  end
end
